title: Fix CommutationChecker for controlled rotation gates
evidence_summary: PR states CRX/CRY/CRZ were incorrectly treated as equivalent to CX/CY/CZ up to global phase, leading to wrong commutation equivalences (e.g., CRZ doesn't commute with Swap, whereas CZ does)
notes: Wrong commutation equivalences in CommutationChecker cause transpiler to produce circuits with incorrect semantic behavior (different layout-applied unitary)

title: Fix ElidePermutations pass in the presence of PermutationGates
evidence_summary: PR description states "leading to incorrect output circuits and updates to the pass manager's property set"
notes: ElidePermutations produced incorrect output circuits due to wrong mapping updates in presence of permutation gates

title: Fix TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout with unordered virtuals
evidence_summary: PR description explains bug was using enumeration index from dict.items() which has nothing to do with virtual qubits
notes: Bug in TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout uses wrong indices for virtual qubits, corrupting metadata while output unitary remains correct

title: Fix tracking of routing permutation in Sabre with disjoint backends
evidence_summary: PR description states "In practice, Sabre aborts immediately after layout without attempting to route"
notes: Sabre fails to route when backing coupling graph is disjoint, causing transpilation to abort

title: Fix BasisTranslator processing of nested ControlFlowOp
evidence_summary: PR description states it fixes a bug by "allowing all calculated transformations to be applied within a ControlFlowOp" and notes that previously transformations were "erroneously skip[ped]"
notes: Previously, BasisTranslator did not apply transformations within ControlFlowOp, leaving gates untranslated to target basis

title: Fix TemplateOptimization dropping the global_phase on substitution
evidence_summary: PR states TemplateOptimization was silently dropping or miscalculating global_phase in three places
notes: Global phase is dropped/miscalculated during template optimization

title: Do not contract control-flow operations during SabreSwap
evidence_summary: PR states previous implementation caused control-flow blocks to contract away from idle qubit wires, which "will no longer be always valid with the addition of Box"
notes: Contraction of control-flow blocks during SabreSwap can produce incorrect circuit semantics

title: Fix BreakLoopOp object has no attribute blocks bug
evidence_summary: PR states bug arises in trivial_recurse when trying to iterate on blocks of BreakLoopOp/ContinueLoopOp which have no blocks
notes: Attempting to access non-existent blocks attribute causes transpilation to fail

title: Fix 4-pi periodicity of controlled rotations in the CommutationChecker
evidence_summary: PR states commutation checker wrongly assumes CRX/Y/Z are equivalent to identity for multiples of 2π (actually 4π)
notes: Incorrect periodicity assumption in commutation checker causes wrong commutation results, producing circuits with incorrect semantic behavior

title: Fix non-determinism in CommutativeCancellation
evidence_summary: PR states HashMap/HashSet iteration causes non-deterministic node removal order, making DAGCircuit edge structure non-deterministic
notes: Non-deterministic iteration order in CommutativeCancellation leads to varying circuit edge structures across runs

title: Fix panic on 1.0 error in VF2Layout
evidence_summary: PR states VF2Layout/VF2PostLayout overlooked that 0*inf is nan, reachable when error rate is 1.0 on a single-qubit node with no 1q operations
notes: NaN scoring causes panic/crash in VF2Layout

title: Restore correct max_trials behaviour for VF2Layout pass
evidence_summary: PR states VF2Layout was not handling negative values and None correctly when ported to Rust, not preserving documented behavior
notes: Incorrect max_trials handling can produce suboptimal layouts

title: Fix composition of final_layout
evidence_summary: PR states previous implementation had final_layout composition backwards, with detailed explanation of correct composition logic
notes: Incorrect composition of final_layout metadata property

title: Use average gate fidelity in the commutation checker
evidence_summary: PR states commutation checker used different metric, causing inconsistent treatment of gates; PR increases threshold making circuits have more gates
notes: Changed commutation metric increases gate count in transpiled circuits

title: Propagate DAGCircuit.name in ApplyLayout
evidence_summary: PR states ApplyLayout didn't propagate DAGCircuit.name, which was masked by transpile but observable in generate_preset_pass_manager
notes: DAGCircuit.name metadata not propagated through ApplyLayout pass

title: Fix non-determinism VF2Layout with only 1q gates
evidence_summary: PR states VF2Layout would cause non-deterministic output for circuits with qubits that only have single-qubit operations due to unstable hash set sorting
notes: Unstable sorting in VF2Layout leads to non-deterministic layout assignments

title: Fix reuse of ConsolidateBlocks instances
evidence_summary: PR states _qubit_map state was not cleared on exit, making re-use of ConsolidateBlocks invalid (e.g., calling PassManager.run multiple times on different circuit sizes)
notes: Stale _qubit_map state in ConsolidateBlocks causes incorrect behavior on pass reuse

title: Fix deepcopy/pickle of DAGCircuit variable IO nodes
evidence_summary: PR states typo in DAGCircuit::pack_into causes Var output nodes to become input nodes during deepcopy or pickling
notes: Serialization bug corrupts Var node direction metadata in DAGCircuit

title: VF2PostLayout added at L3 (no-op overhead; reverted)
evidence_summary: PR adds VF2PostLayout with strict_direction mode to optimization level 3 (fixes feature request #14100)
notes: Missing optimization pass at level 3 results in suboptimal circuit quality

title: Reject loopback edges in CouplingMap
evidence_summary: PR states CouplingMap should reject loopback edges (2q interaction using same qubit twice), as downstream consumers could error in strange ways
notes: Missing validation allows invalid coupling maps to cause downstream errors

title: Fix composing virtual permutation layouts for ElidePermutations and StarPreRouting
evidence_summary: PR states previous implementation incorrectly took inverse of final layout when composing virtual permutation layouts in ElidePermutations and StarPreRouting
notes: Incorrect composition logic for virtual permutation layouts corrupts metadata

title: Add 2q fractional gates to the ConsolidateBlocks transpiler pass
evidence_summary: PR adds new 2q-fractional gates (e.g., RZZGate) to ConsolidateBlocks pass
notes: Missing gate support in ConsolidateBlocks leads to suboptimal circuit consolidation

title: Delegate BasePass.__call__ to PassManager.run
evidence_summary: PR states calling a pass directly fails while running via passmanager works; ensures same execution logic
notes: Inconsistent execution logic between direct pass calls and passmanager causes failures

title: Correctly combining control modifiers in OptimizeAnnotated
evidence_summary: PR states OptimizeAnnotated did not correctly apply order of modifiers, causing incorrect semantics
notes: Wrong modifier order in OptimizeAnnotated produces circuits with incorrect semantic behavior

title: Fix VF2PostLayout with uncoupled qubits in strict_direction=True
evidence_summary: PR fixes bug where VF2PostLayout can fail during layout expansion with uncoupled qubits
notes: VF2PostLayout fails during layout expansion causing transpilation to abort

title: Fix VF2 layout allocation with idle qubits
evidence_summary: PR states VF2 passes failed to allocate completely idle qubits into Layout objects, causing TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout to bug out
notes: Incomplete Layout objects missing idle qubits corrupt metadata
